name: Balcony Flash Selfie Night
description: Late night apartment balcony selfie with iPhone flash, cozy vibes, beer bottle prop
input_prompt: woman taking flash selfie on apartment balcony at night with beer

subject.description: young woman early 20s with blonde shoulder-length hair, beautiful genuine happy smile, slightly tipsy cozy vibes

physical_details.body_type: slim-thick with soft defined waist, rounded hips, naturally full chest

skin.texture: natural with flash illumination, realistic shine

face.expression: the most beautiful genuine smile, joyful and happy

clothing.details: barefoot with white french nail polish

pose_action.position: sitting on outdoor sofa, knees pulled toward chest, cozy curled up
pose_action.camera_relation: arm-length selfie, slightly above eye level, bare feet to head framing
pose_action.dynamic_elements: phone hand holding for selfie, other hand loosely holding Carlsberg beer bottle

props.details: visible label, held loosely in hand

lighting.quality: direct flash with soft ambient spill

flattened_prompt: ultra-photorealistic, raw iPhone flash selfie, iPhone 15 Pro Max front camera with flash, young woman early 20s blonde shoulder-length hair, most beautiful genuine happy smile, pale skin warm undertone natural shine from flash, black knit cardigan buttoned no bra dark yoga leggings barefoot white french nail polish, sitting on outdoor sofa knees pulled to chest cozy pose, holding Carlsberg beer bottle with visible label, apartment balcony at night soft blurred city lights, direct front flash bright face soft shadows behind, arm-length selfie slightly above eye level feet to head framing, late-night intimate tipsy happy vibes, 9:16 vertical

midjourney.prompt: raw iPhone flash selfie, young woman blonde hair genuine happy smile, black cardigan dark leggings barefoot, sitting cozy on balcony sofa holding beer bottle, night city lights blurred, direct flash illumination natural skin shine, tipsy happy intimate vibes --ar 9:16 --style raw --v 6
midjourney.notes: Use --style raw for authentic flash selfie look

ideogram.prompt: iPhone flash selfie of young blonde woman on apartment balcony at night, genuine happy smile, wearing black knit cardigan and dark leggings, sitting cozy with knees up holding Carlsberg beer, soft blurred city lights in background, direct flash illumination

recraft.prompt: Flash selfie on balcony at night, blonde woman happy smile, black cardigan dark leggings, holding beer bottle, city lights background, iPhone flash look

luma.prompt: Night balcony scene, young woman takes flash selfie while holding beer, city lights twinkle in background, warm intimate atmosphere, slight movement as she adjusts pose
luma.motion_notes: Subtle selfie pose adjustment, city lights flickering in background, relaxed movement

reve.prompt: Authentic social media flash photography in the style of candid night selfies, young blonde woman on apartment balcony, cozy pose with beer bottle, iPhone flash illumination against city night backdrop

grok-imagine.prompt: Flash selfie at night, blonde woman on apartment balcony, happy genuine smile, black cardigan dark leggings barefoot, holding beer bottle, cozy pose knees up, blurred city lights, iPhone flash look

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A young woman in her early 20s takes an iPhone flash selfie while sitting on an outdoor sofa on her apartment balcony at night. She has blonde shoulder-length slightly messy hair and the most beautiful genuine happy smile with a joyful, slightly tipsy expression. Her skin is pale with a warm undertone, showing natural shine from the flash illumination. She wears a black knit sweater cardigan that drapes loosely and is buttoned with no bra underneath, paired with dark yoga leggings. She is barefoot with white French nail polish. Her pose is cozy and curled up with knees pulled toward her chest. One hand holds the phone for the selfie while the other loosely holds a Carlsberg beer bottle with visible label. The background shows soft blurred city lights and the night sky. The direct front flash creates bright illumination on her face with soft shadows behind her. The framing captures from bare feet to head at arm-length, slightly above eye level. The atmosphere is late-night, intimate, and warmly tipsy. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Realistic skin texture with authentic flash photography look.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Young woman early 20s taking iPhone flash selfie on apartment balcony at night, blonde shoulder-length messy hair, genuine happy smile joyful expression, pale skin warm undertone natural flash shine, black knit cardigan buttoned no bra dark yoga leggings barefoot white french nails, sitting cozy on outdoor sofa knees pulled to chest, holding Carlsberg beer bottle with visible label, soft blurred city lights background night sky, direct front flash bright face soft shadows behind, arm-length selfie above eye level feet to head framing, tipsy intimate late-night vibes, not studio lighting or airbrushed
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: Young woman early 20s takes flash selfie on apartment balcony at night. Blonde shoulder-length slightly messy hair, genuine happy smile, pale skin with warm undertone and natural shine from flash. Wearing black knit sweater cardigan buttoned loosely with no bra, dark yoga leggings, barefoot with white French nail polish. Sitting cozy on outdoor sofa with knees pulled to chest, one hand holds phone for selfie, other loosely holds Carlsberg beer bottle with visible label. Soft blurred city lights in background with night sky. Direct iPhone front flash illuminates face brightly with soft shadows behind. Arm-length selfie framing from feet to head, slightly above eye level. Late-night intimate happy atmosphere.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the drink from a Carlsberg beer bottle to a glass of red wine while keeping her cozy pose, happy expression, and the nighttime balcony setting with city lights the same. Preserve the flash selfie lighting.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed clothing with material/fit, specific beer brand, nail polish detail
2_realism_anchors: 'iPhone flash look', 'natural skin shine from flash', 'visible beer label'
5_spatial_consistency: 'arm-length selfie', 'above eye level', 'feet to head framing'
6_lighting_storytelling: 'front flash + city lights' = intimate late-night mood
